parsed.generic_mechanism: Sustained setup-and-payoff sequencing lets details accumulate; reversing those dependencies turns controlled sentences into disconnected fragments and converts the intended opening into an abrupt ending.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A concrete animal scene opens into a legible argument, while later examples, history, warnings, and an illusion mostly build in sequence; emphatic repetition and the closing bullet recap blunt the middle and final landing.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Specific images survive at sentence level, but conclusions routinely precede setups, headings arrive after their material, and the chapter runs backward into its own opening, destroying referents, momentum, and closure.
